name: Audio Reactive Basic
description: Minimal audio-reactive starter mirroring the standalone shape of create_audio_reactive (Layer-1): an audio source feeds both an Audio Spectrum CHOP (for FFT visuals) and an Analyze CHOP (for an overall RMS level). The spectrum is published as a CHOP-to-TOP texture that a downstream visual chain can sample; the RMS level is exposed as a stable Null CHOP ready for bind_to_channel. A Constant TOP placeholder frame reacts out of the box: a CHOP Execute callback drives its violet brightness from the RMS level, so the frame pulses with the sound with no manual wiring. Swap the audiodeviceinCHOP for an audiofileinCHOP to drive it from a file. Live-validated in TouchDesigner 099 build 2025.32820 (with a synthetic tone, since the RMS is 0 without a live mic).

nodes.name: audioin
nodes.comment: Live audio input. Replace with audiofileinCHOP if you prefer a file source.

nodes.name: spectrum
nodes.comment: FFT spectrum. outlength clamped into TD's 128–4096 range to keep choptoTOP within GPU limits.

nodes.name: level
nodes.comment: RMS power (menu name, not index — the bridge validates menu values). One stable amplitude channel for downstream modulation.

nodes.name: level_null
nodes.comment: Stable ref for bind_to_channel ('chan1' = RMS amplitude).

nodes.name: audio_tex
nodes.comment: Spectrum as a 1-row texture. Sample sTD2DInputs[0] in a downstream GLSL TOP.

nodes.name: sensitivity
nodes.comment: Sensitivity gain on the spectrum texture before any visual chain consumes it.

nodes.name: out_color
nodes.comment: Visual placeholder frame. Dim violet at rest; color_drive raises its brightness with the RMS level so it pulses with the sound.

nodes.name: color_drive
nodes.comment: Drives out_color's brightness from the RMS level via its callback, so the frame reacts to audio out of the box.

nodes.name: out1
nodes.comment: Final output of the audio-reactive system.

python_code.color_drive:
def onValueChange(channel, sampleIndex, val, prev):
    k = max(0.0, min(val * 1.4, 1.0))
    b = 0.15 + 0.85 * k
    oc = op('out_color').par
    oc.colorr = 0.55 * b
    oc.colorg = 0.15 * b
    oc.colorb = 0.90 * b
    return

preview_description: A violet placeholder frame that pulses in brightness with the audio RMS level, with the spectrum + RMS analysis chain behind it (spectrum texture ready to feed a custom shader). Live-validated in TouchDesigner 099 build 2025.32820.
